refactor: rename survey-level axes (core→foundation, diff→progress+gap)

Update 11 Turkish fish name etymologies

From Greek (7):
- Çinekop: from τσινοκόπος (small lüfer)
- Akya: from λίτσα (leerfish)
- Laho: from βλάχος (Wallachian/grouper)
- Tiriça: from θρίσα (Black Sea variant)
- Tirsi: from θρίσσα (shad)
- Torik: from ταρῖχος (salted tuna)
- Pisi: from ψῆττα (flatfish)

From Arabic (1):
- Mezgit: from مزيت (mazīt, oily)

From Laz (1):
- Maroşkil: Hopa regional, Caucasian origin

Uncertain (2):
- Gambot, İlarya: require further research

commit.message:
Fix auth: clear stale cookie on gate load + set JS cookie on success

Root cause: browser could have a stale/wrong astra_auth cookie cached,
causing infinite redirect loop (middleware rejects, sends to gate, gate
has cookie, tries index, middleware rejects again).

Fix: Gate page now clears any existing cookie on load, then sets both
HttpOnly (via API) and JS cookie on successful login. Belt and suspenders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(council): tab refresh, SSE sync, consensus persistence (#550)

* feat(council): tab refresh, SSE sync, consensus persistence

Phase 1: Export refreshCouncil and wire it to tab switch in app.ts
so Council data refreshes when navigating to the tab.

Phase 2: Subscribe to decision_* SSE events in store.ts with
debounced council refresh. Replace server-dependent CouncilFeedNotice
with local signal-based health indicator.

Phase 3: Add file-based write-through persistence to Consensus
module (.masc/consensus/<id>.json). Sessions survive server restart.
Follows the same atomic temp+rename pattern as Debate module.

49/49 council tests pass including 2 new persistence tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(mdal): reduce Board noise — keep only concise final post

- Remove START and ITERATION Board posts (telemetry, not announcements)
- Keep FINAL Board post with concise 1-line format via format_final_board
- Remove dead state_post_id field from loop_state (set but never read)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(lodge): move Activity Report from Board to SSE broadcast

Lodge Activity Report was posted to Board every heartbeat cycle (~4h),
creating ~6 posts/day of system telemetry. Board is for agent-generated
content (thoughts, code, replies), not recurring status reports.

Now broadcasts as SSE event (lodge_activity_report type) instead.
Dashboard can still consume it; Board stays clean.

commit.message:
Fix dashboard budget calculation to prioritize monthly budgets

Issue: When both yearly and monthly budgets exist for the same category,
the dashboard was showing whichever was processed last from the database
instead of consistently prioritizing monthly budgets.

Example: Income - Employment had:
- Yearly: 110,326.75 (÷12 = 9,193.90/month)
- Monthly (Feb): 8,893.45
Was showing: 9,194 (yearly)
Should show: 8,893.45 (monthly)

Fix: Separate yearly and monthly budgets into different dictionaries,
then merge with monthly taking precedence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix TypeScript error: Remove productId from ProductImage objects

Removed productId field from all image objects in products.ts as it's not
defined in the ProductImage interface. This fixes the Vercel deployment error:
"Object literal may only specify known properties, and 'productId' does not
exist in type 'ProductImage'."

* feat: add down command

Implements the destructive teardown command that stops the server,
kills the tmux session, removes the git worktree, and deletes the
state file. Guards against accidental deletion of unpushed branches
unless --force is passed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add list command

Adds `forsa-dev list` which reads all state files, live-checks each
environment (tmux session and port), and prints a Rich table. Pure
status logic lives in the new `list_status` module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add .gitignore

* chore: restore full .gitignore and add opt-machine-setup.md

* fix: resolve bugs found in code review

- allocate_port is now a context manager so the port lock is held while
  the caller writes state, closing the race window where two concurrent
  `up` commands could select the same port
- `down` always runs `docker compose down` (idempotent; was guarded by
  env.url which meant a serve-never-run env skipped cleanup)
- branch_is_pushed raises on git error instead of silently returning
  False (which would let `down --force`-less teardown skip a bad repo)
- logging.basicConfig configured so Caddy warning()s are visible
- serve URL now has https:// scheme
- removed redundant hand-written __eq__ on Config and Environment
  (frozen/plain dataclasses generate correct __eq__ automatically)
- added comment in _serialize explaining the Path/datetime overrides

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address remaining review findings

- restore missing PEP 8 blank lines in config.py and state.py (removed
  with __eq__ methods in previous commit)
- move `import subprocess` to module level in cli.py (was deferred
  inside 5 command functions for no reason)
- _compose_cmd: derive project name from _full_name(user, name) instead
  of env.tmux_session, making the source of the name explicit
- state.py: remove unused `timezone` import; add logger; improve
  _serialize comment; list_states now skips malformed JSON files with
  a warning instead of crashing
- test_serve: assert full URL including https:// scheme
- add test for restart command
- add test for init command (all 10 prompts + config roundtrip)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: replace real Tailscale hostname with example placeholder

식사 평가를 이모지 카드 3열 그리드로 변경

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: AI hallucinating dates - Force model to use context data as truth

The AI was inventing dates and consultazione names instead of using
the real data from the database context. Three root causes:

1. Context label said "usa solo se pertinente" → model ignored it
   Changed to "FIDATI di questi dati, sono reali e aggiornati"

2. System prompt said "usa le tue conoscenze" → license to hallucinate
   Changed to "MAI contraddire il contesto" + "NON INVENTARE date"

3. Consultazione context was too sparse (just name + date range)
   Now includes descrizione and tipi_elezione for richer context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: scroll to top only on forward navigation

Move scroll logic from PostDetails module script to Layout inline
script. The old approach registered a persistent listener that
forced scrollTo(0,0) on every navigation including back/forward.

Now uses astro:before-preparation navigationType to distinguish
forward (push/replace) from traverse (back/forward), letting
Astro's built-in scroll restoration work on back navigation.

Sort scenes by size descending to improve concurrency utilization

Larger scenes (more batches) start first, shorter ones fill idle threads,
avoiding the long-tail problem where heavy scenes run alone at the end.

ci(renovate): clean up orphan branches after each run (#84)

## Summary

- Adds a `cleanup-orphan-branches` job to `renovate.yml` that runs after
every Renovate execution (including on failure, via `if: always()`)
- Finds every `renovate/*` branch with no open PR and deletes it via the
GitHub API using `GITHUB_TOKEN`
- Deleted the 9 existing orphan branches immediately (no PRs were open
for any of them)

## How it works

The cleanup job pages through all branches matching `renovate/*`, checks
for open PRs on each, and calls `DELETE
/repos/{owner}/{repo}/git/refs/heads/{branch}` for any branch with zero
open PRs. Branches that have an open PR are left untouched.

`delete_branch_on_merge = true` (already set in Terraform) handles the
post-merge case — this job covers the no-PR case.

## Test plan

- [ ] CI passes on this PR
- [ ] Verify the 9 orphan branches no longer appear on the [active
branches page](https://github.com/lucasrudi/mindtrack/branches/active)
- [ ] Trigger the renovate workflow manually after merging to confirm
the cleanup job runs and logs correctly

Closes #83

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(reservations): unify active status semantics and expose 409 reason field

Changes:
1. CANCELLED_STATUS / SQL_ACTIVE_FILTER constants in index.ts — single
   source of truth for "active reservation" definition used by /slots,
   /reserve, and the partial unique index idx_res_unique_active.

2. All /reserve 409 responses now include a top-level `reason` field
   (not just inside _debug):
   - all_staff_busy: every active staff has an overlapping reservation
   - single_capacity_full: no staff configured and slot occupied
   - duration_overlap: specific staff has overlapping reservation
   - unique_violation: D1 UNIQUE constraint (safety net)
   - lock_conflict: Durable Object lock held by another request
   `_debug` still only appears with ?debug=1.

3. StepConfirm isSlotConflict simplified — any 409 triggers onBack()
   since all 409 reasons mean the slot is unavailable.

E2E verified (2026-03-15, clean date):
- store-aea0: 1st reserve OK → 2nd auto-assign OK → 3rd all_staff_busy
- default: reserve OK
- /slots ○→200, ×→409 alignment confirmed
- Cross-tenant isolation correct
- reason field present in both debug and non-debug
- Cancelled slots on 2026-03-07 are bookable (partial index working)

commit.message:
fix(a11y): resolve WCAG violations in HTML report (#255) (#264)

## Summary

Resolves three WCAG accessibility violations in the HTML mutation
testing report, plus a defence-in-depth security fix discovered during
review.

### WCAG Fixes

| Violation | Criterion | Severity | Fix |
|-----------|-----------|----------|-----|
| `:focus-visible` outline used undefined `var(--accent)` — invisible to
keyboard users | WCAG 2.4.7 Focus Visible | Critical | Replace with
`var(--color-primary-light)` (defined in both themes) |
| `toggleTheme()` never updated `aria-pressed` — screen readers always
announced button as "pressed" | WCAG 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value | High |
Add `btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', ...)` in toggle +
`DOMContentLoaded` listener for page-load sync |
| Results table had no `<caption>` and `<th>` elements lacked
`scope="col"` — screen readers couldn't navigate | WCAG 1.3.1 Info and
Relationships | High | Add `<caption>Gremlin mutation testing
results</caption>` and `scope="col"` on all 5 headers |

### Additional Fix (found during bug hunt)

The `aria-pressed` sync in `_get_theme_init_script` ran in `<head>`
before the DOM was parsed — `querySelector('.theme-toggle')` returned
`null` and the sync was silently dead. Fixed with a `DOMContentLoaded`
listener.

### Defence-in-Depth (found during security audit)

`localStorage.getItem('gremlins-theme')` was passed directly to
`setAttribute('data-theme', ...)`. Added an allowlist check (`saved ===
'dark' || saved === 'light'`) to prevent arbitrary strings from reaching
the attribute.

## Root Cause

All three violations were introduced during the original HTML report
implementation and were missed at the time. Discovered via a11y audit
against the WCAG 2.1 checklist.

## Test Plan

- [x] 7 new tests in `DescribeHtmlReporterA11y` covering all fixes
- [x] 1 test for `DOMContentLoaded` aria-pressed page-load sync
- [x] 1 test for localStorage allowlist
- [x] 103 small tests passing
- [x] mypy strict: 0 issues
- [x] ruff: 0 issues
- [x] Pre-push hooks: all green

## Files Changed

- `src/pytest_gremlins/reporting/html.py` — CSS variable fix, JS
aria-pressed updates, table semantic markup, localStorage allowlist
- `tests/reporting/test_html.py` — `DescribeHtmlReporterA11y` class with
9 new tests

Closes #255

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: 소설 → 영상 → 유튜브 쇼츠 자동화 파이프라인 (mflux + Mac MLX)

commit.message:
fix: resolve CI lint errors and SonarCloud quality gate failures

- Replace 3x `catch (e: any)` with `catch (e: unknown)` + type narrowing in seed.ts
- Simplify redundant `[APap]` → `[AP]` regex class in atlanta-hash-board.ts (has /i flag)
- Add sonar-project.properties to exclude seed.ts from duplication analysis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent app hang from baked-in DEFAULT_GATEWAY_URL forcing server mode

- Remove DEFAULT_GATEWAY_URL from build-time defines (always empty string)
  Server mode is configured via ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json, not build env
- Add 8s timeout for Clerk initialization with graceful fallback to local mode
- Fix circular symlinks in prepare-gateway.sh (pnpm workspace back-references)
- Suppress cp -RLf errors from remaining cycles

Root cause: CI secrets (DEFAULT_GATEWAY_URL, CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY) were baked
into the Electron main process at build time. This forced the app into server
mode, Clerk tried to initialize against a dev instance and failed, leaving the
app stuck with a white screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Show tier discounts on bundle pricing (3 of 8 videos get 10% off)

Calculate bundle prices using the same tier discount logic as the cart:
assign highest discount slots to most expensive items. For an 8-video
bundle, videos 6-8 cross the Regular tier (10% off). Shows strikethrough
original price + discount pill when applicable. 4-video bundle unaffected
since it doesn't reach the 6-video threshold.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: use pre-built images from ghcr.io instead of building on server

Switch from building Docker images on the VPS (which OOMs with only
3GB available RAM) to pulling pre-built images from GitHub Container
Registry. Images are built locally and pushed to ghcr.io.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

修正: リマッチ検知バグ(teamBattle.remove競合)・ミニマップ消失・デバッグログ削除

- teamBattle.remove()を削除(hostStartGameのatomic writeと競合していた)

- ミニマップ: ランナー時にdisplay:blockを確実に設定

- 全体を見るボタン: ランナー+モバイルで表示復元

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: remove offline mode, rename settings routes and update labels

- Remove FF_OFFLINE_MODE feature entirely (flag, env var, offline
  indicator component, offline-fetch/store/sync-manager utilities)
- Rename settings/api-keys → settings/apis with tab label "APIs"
- Rename settings/security → settings/twofactor with tab label "2FA"
- Update navigation config, i18n locale files (en/fr), and all
  internal links to match new route paths
